The '''LH-3010 capital freighter''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] produced by [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends|Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc.]]<ref name="BLa" />

==History==
Designed and manufactured over five centuries prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], it was used by [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Merchant/Legends|traders]]. One such vessel, scheduled for decommissioning, was sold to [[Hugo Bartyn]]. Bartyn placed the ship upon [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]] and it became the city of [[Bartyn's Landing]].<ref name="BLa" />
